subject: TO BE SENT TO BARRY IF YOU SO CHOOSE
body:
I think this should be the first page that says
...THIS IS THE WEBSITE OF YOUR GRAND JURY WITNESS , i
CAN ALSO SEND A COPY OF THE POLICE REPORT FROM LAST
WEEK DETAILING HER DRUG ABUSE..  
Note: forwarded message attached.


__________________________________________________
